description: Each query's three answers (Linkup, Sonar, Sonar Pro) reviewed side by side and scored 1-5 on four criteria. Judge sees all three answers but does not know provider identity during scoring.

dataset.simpleqa_description: Factual Q&A from OpenAI SimpleQA benchmark with known correct answers. Graded by exact string match (A = exact match, B = 80%+ word overlap, C = 50%+ overlap, F = miss).

scoring_criteria.name: relevance
scoring_criteria.description: Does the answer address the query directly?

scoring_criteria.name: accuracy
scoring_criteria.description: Is the information factually correct and trustworthy?

scoring_criteria.name: completeness
scoring_criteria.description: Does the answer cover the key aspects of the query?

scoring_criteria.name: usefulness
scoring_criteria.description: Would this answer be practically helpful to the user?

overall_score: Holistic 1-5 score based on the four criteria, with accuracy and relevance weighted most heavily.
